name: Pane Di Como Antico (Como Bread of the Past)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the biga thoroughly.
2. Combine the biga with the remaining ingredients in a bowl.
3. Knead the dough until smooth.
4. Let it rest for 30 minutes.
5. Shape the dough into a loaf and bake at 425°F (220°C) for about 40 minutes, or until golden brown.
